rich_text.plain_text: [Danvers, MA – March 25th, 2025] MAXAM Tire is pleased to announce they are expanding their already robust warranty program, now offering

text.content: of comprehensive coverage on all Agriculture Radial (Ag Radial) tires. This enhancement reflects MAXAM’s unwavering confidence in all its products and underscores the company’s commitment to delivering maximum value and peace of mind to customers in the agricultural industry.

text.content: Key updates to the warranty program include:

rich_text.plain_text: Key updates to the warranty program include:

text.content: Extended Coverage for (5) Years for All Radial Ag Tires

rich_text.plain_text: Extended Coverage for (5) Years for All Radial Ag Tires

text.content: As always, all MAXAM Ag Radial tires are covered, but now benefit from an additional year of coverage against field hazards, stubble damage, and applications involving scraper service.

rich_text.plain_text: As always, all MAXAM Ag Radial tires are covered, but now benefit from an additional year of coverage against field hazards, stubble damage, and applications involving scraper service.

text.content: Stubble Damage and Field Hazard Coverage

rich_text.plain_text: Stubble Damage and Field Hazard Coverage

text.content: MAXAM leads the way by extending stubble damage and field hazard coverage to (5) full years, ensuring that farmers have reliable protection in challenging conditions.

rich_text.plain_text: MAXAM leads the way by extending stubble damage and field hazard coverage to (5) full years, ensuring that farmers have reliable protection in challenging conditions.

text.content: MAXAM is the only manufacturer currently covering all scraper applications and are now extending it for an additional year—offering robust, long-term protection against the toughest wear-and-tear scenarios.

text.content: “Our mission at MAXAM has always been to provide durable, high-performing solutions that our customers can rely on,” says

rich_text.plain_text: “Our mission at MAXAM has always been to provide durable, high-performing solutions that our customers can rely on,” says

text.content: Greg Gilland, VP of Agriculture at MAXAM Tire

rich_text.plain_text: Greg Gilland, VP of Agriculture at MAXAM Tire

text.content:
. “By expanding our Ag Radial warranty, we’re reinforcing our promise to deliver exceptional tires and comprehensive coverage that truly puts farmers first.”

These warranty enhancements apply to MAXAM’s entire line of Ag Radial tires, ensuring every MAXAM Ag customer—big or small—benefits from the new industry-leading coverage. The expansion of warranty coverage is just one example of MAXAM’s consistent dedication to setting higher standards in tire performance, reliability, and customer satisfaction.

For more information about MAXAM’s line of Agriculture tires, or any of our products, please visit
